description: Fix remaining superproject debt: mypy errors, ruff lint errors, Textual signature overrides, enum deprecation, line length

stories.title: Fix mypy union-attr errors in core/memory/store.py
stories.description: core/memory/store.py has 10 union-attr errors where self._conn could be None. Add proper null checks or initialize connection in __init__.

stories.title: Fix Textual RichLog override signatures in cli/tui.py
stories.description: cli/tui.py has 6 mypy errors from overriding RichLog.write(), clear(), write_markup() with incompatible signatures. Also fix TUIMetrics reactive annotation and notify severity literal types.

stories.title: Fix ChangeType inheritance and AVAILABLE_TOOLS/SYSTEM_PROMPT naming
stories.description: core/selfimprove/meta_agent.py:18 - ChangeType should use StrEnum instead of (str, Enum). core/orchestrator/core.py - rename AVAILABLE_TOOLS and SYSTEM_PROMPT to lowercase per N802.

stories.title: Fix remaining E501 line length violations
stories.description: Fix remaining 30 E501 line length errors across cli/tui.py, cli/main.py, cli/parser.py, core/selfimprove/critic.py, core/tools/__init__.py, tests/unit/.

stories.title: Fix UP042 StrEnum migration in core/selfimprove/meta_agent.py
stories.description: core/selfimprove/meta_agent.py:18 - ChangeType inherits from both str and Enum. Use StrEnum (Python 3.11+).

stories.title: Fix mypy arg-type error in core/orchestrator/core.py
stories.description: core/orchestrator/core.py:310 - assemble() receives Session | None but expects Session. Add None guard.

stories.title: Fix notify severity literal types in cli/tui.py
stories.description: cli/tui.py lines 343 and 503 use severity='info' but Textual expects 'information'. Fix literal type.

stories.title: Final verification: run ruff, mypy, pytest
stories.description: Run all quality checks. Verify ruff check passes (0 errors), mypy passes (0 errors), pytest passes (274/274). Update SUPERPROJECT.md with final scorecard.
